groupings.title: Database Connectors
groupings.description: Produce and ingest OKF bundles from SQL databases and warehouses.

groupings.title: Filesystem & Git
groupings.description: Produce and ingest OKF bundles from local directory trees and Git repositories.

groupings.title: Agent Guidance
groupings.description: Instructions-only skills that teach an agent to read and enrich OKF bundles, and to author the producer skills that generate them.

groupings.title: Visualization
groupings.description: Render OKF bundles into a browsable, interactive HTML graph view.
